title: Dense Argentinian Chocolate Chips Brownies
description: Fresh, dense, and rich Argentinian-style brownies featuring dark chocolate chips, perfect as a post-workout treat. This vegan-friendly dessert is made with wholesome ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C) and grease an 8-inch square baking pan with non-stick spray.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, cocoa powder, coconut sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together canola oil, vanilla extract, and flax eggs mixed with water.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
Fold in the dark chocolate chips.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out with a few moist crumbs.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely in the pan before cutting into squares.
